ch: B:不要再玩了，快坐在座位上。
en: Stop playing and quickly sit in your seat.
Sorry, I’m late!
Come in quickly.
What day is it today?

ab: kayasaa singci lrima, ludhaa taibalriva, ilata kahedele avavaehe!
ch: B:今天星期五，明天放假，一起出去玩吧!
en: It’s Friday today, we have a day off tomorrow. Let’s go out and play together!
Great! Let’s go to the riverside.
What day will it be tomorrow?

ab: ludhaa singci tulru, lu makamulringedele ludhaa ilata ngimaimalri!
ch: B:明天星期三，我們明天下午去玩球吧!
en: Tomorrow will be Wednesday. Let’s go play ball tomorrow afternoon!
What will you be doing tomorrow morning?

ab: ludha niciyubi, aikahedelaku ki ina mukyukai.
ch: B:明天是星期日，我要和媽媽去教會。
en: Tomorrow will be Sunday, I will be going to church with my mom.
What’s wrong?
I feel like vomiting. I need to go to the restroom.
I feel dizzy.
Lie down and rest.

ch: A:老師，我肚子痛，要去廁所。
en: Teacher, I have a stomachache. I need to go to the restroom.
Okay, go quickly.
May I go wash my hands?
It’s almost time for class to end. Wait a little longer.

ab: singsi, waangeange kay aulruli, aiibalrivaku lumyaiyaubu.
ch: A:老師，我頭好痛，下午要請假。
en: Teacher, I have a severe headache. I need to take a sick leave in the afternoon.
Okay, take care and go home.

ab: singsi, lubibilrili ki singci ea aiibalrivaku, aikiceelaku ki kwisang.
ch: A:老師我下禮拜一要請假，我要去看醫生。
en: Teacher, I need to take a sick leave next Monday. I have to see a doctor.
Alright, take care of yourself.
Where is Muni?
She has a stomachache. She’s in the restroom.
Where is Kui?

ab: singsi, ku Kui kyaangeange ki cilulra, aiibalriyu kayasaa.
en: Teacher, Kui has a sore throat. She took a sick leave today.
Why didn’t Muni come?
She has a fever.
